goal: Create a useful compact brief for any non-specialized URL without cookies, browser automation, or arbitrary JavaScript execution.
steps: Normalize URL and remove common tracking parameters.
Use tab title, host, path, and browser group as immediate evidence.
Fetch with no cookies if allowed by settings and size limits.
Extract content type, status, canonical link, HTML title, meta description, Open Graph/Twitter card fields, headings, and main-text excerpt.
Detect auth/dashboard/login/private-looking pages and keep shallow records.
Create extraction artifact with status and provenance.
Build a resource brief with user annotations first.
